tier_c.description: Non-EC2 findings — log groups, ghost resources, S3

C1.description: CloudWatch log group with no retention policy

finding.detection_reason: Log group /aws/lambda/payment-processor has no retention policy — logs accumulate indefinitely.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Log group /aws/lambda/payment-processor has no retention_in_days set — logs accumulate indefinitely at $0.76/month.

key_facts: log group /aws/lambda/payment-processor has no retention policy
logs accumulate indefinitely — 1.57 GB/month at $0.76/month cost
fix: add retention_in_days to existing aws_cloudwatch_log_group resource
no new resources required — simple attribute addition

C2.description: CloudWatch log group with high ingestion volume — S3 archival recommended

finding.detection_reason: Log group /aws/eks/production-cluster ingests 12.87 GB/month — exceeds 10 GB/month threshold. S3 archival recommended.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Log group /aws/eks/production-cluster ingests 12.87 GB/month — exceeds 10 GB/month threshold. S3 subscription filter archival recommended.

key_facts: 12.87 GB/month ingestion exceeds 10 GB/month threshold
S3 archival via subscription filter is the correct action
requires 3 new resources: subscription filter + S3 bucket + IAM role
existing log group retention stays — subscription is additive
aws_caller_identity must be used — no hardcoded account IDs

C3.description: Ghost EIP — unattached for more than 48 hours

finding.detection_reason: EIP 54.23.11.204 unattached for 12 days — confirmed ghost resource.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: EIP 54.23.11.204 unattached for 12 days — confirmed ghost resource. No data loss risk: EIP carries no data.

key_facts: EIP 54.23.11.204 unattached for 12 days — confirmed ghost
$3.60/month wasted on unused allocation
EIP has no data — release is safe
lifecycle prevent_destroy = false required to allow destroy
FinOpsAction tag must be added

C4.description: Ghost EBS volume — available state for more than 48 hours

finding.detection_reason: EBS volume vol-0a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8 (100 GB gp3) in available state for 7 days — confirmed ghost resource. Data loss warning: volume contents will be permanently deleted.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: EBS volume vol-0a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8 (100 GB gp3) in available state for 7 days — confirmed ghost resource. DATA LOSS: volume contents will be permanently deleted.

key_facts: EBS volume vol-0a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8 (100 GB gp3) unattached 7 days
$8.00/month wasted
DATA LOSS: volume contents permanently deleted — must be explicitly acknowledged
data_loss_acknowledged field must be true in response
lifecycle prevent_destroy = false required
business_justification must explain irreversibility

C5.description: S3 bucket with cold data — Glacier transition recommended

finding.detection_reason: 84.7% of objects in company-data-archive-prod are older than 90 days with no lifecycle policy. Glacier Instant Retrieval transition recommended.

agent2_decision.detection_reason: 84.7% of objects in company-data-archive-prod are older than 90 days with no lifecycle policy — Glacier Instant Retrieval transition saves $34.09/month.

key_facts: 84.7% of 84,320 objects older than 90 days
no lifecycle policy currently set
Glacier Instant Retrieval transition at 90 days saves $34.09/month
aws_s3_bucket_lifecycle_configuration must be a separate resource (not inline)
transition noncurrent versions too if applicable
